urdu transliteration text: Visualization:
english translation text: The poet imagines Imam Hussain (as) calling out to his beloved mother as he falls from his horse moments before martyrdom

urdu transliteration text:
Haay asr ka waqt hai
Shabbir ki aati hai sada
english translation text:
Woe! It is the time of Asr
The voice of Shabbir is heard:

urdu transliteration text:
Chur zakhmo se badan hogaya ama mera
Apani agosh me ab mujko chupalo ama
english translation text:
"O Mother! My body has been mutilated with wounds!“
"Cover me in your embrace, O Mother"

urdu transliteration text: Are dhoop hai apni aba aan ke dalo ama
english translation text: "O the sun's scorching heat! Cover me with your aba, Mother"

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Thak gayaa lash utha kar me bhare lashkar ki
Laash qasim ki me laya hu kabhi akber ki
english translation text:
"I am exhausted of carrying the corpses of the entire army“
"The corpse of Qasim have I lifted, then the corpse of Akber"

urdu transliteration text:
Khud baniyi he lahad me ne ali asger ki
Do tasali muje sine se lagalo ama
english translation text:
"Myself have I dug the grave of Ali Asgher“
"Offer me condoloences, take me into your embrace, O Mother"

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Teer talwar se, khanjar se badan zakhmi hai
Khaak jalti hai to zakhmo pe chubhan hoti hai
english translation text:
"With arrows and swords and daggers has my body been wounded“
"As the burning sands swirl, they sting these wounds"

urdu transliteration text:
Mere zakhmo se mere dil ka lahu jari hai
Apni chadar ko mere zakhm pe dalo ama
english translation text:
"The blood of my heart flows forth from each gash“
"Cover my wounds with your veil, Mother"

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Mera abbas khafa hogaya amma moojse
Wo nahi aaya utha laya tha bazu uske
english translation text:
"My Abbas does not speak with me any more, Mother“
"He did not return, I only brought back his arms"

urdu transliteration text:
Aap ek kaam kare nehre kanare jaake
Mere ruthe huwe bhayi ko manaalo ama
"Console my upset brother, Mother"
english translation text: "Do me a favour, go to the edge of the river“

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Chakiya pisi hai godi me bithakar mujko
Jaag ti rehti thi zaanu pe sula kar mujko
english translation text:
"Remember, You worked the flour mill as I would sit in your laps“
"You would stay awake all night while I slept on your laps"

urdu transliteration text:
Loriya detithi Jule me jula kar mujko
Ek baar god me phir apni sulalo ama
english translation text:
"You would recite lullabies as you cradled me to sleep“
"Make me sleep in your lap one more time, Mother"

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Aur kuch der ka mehmaan hu tum paas raho
Ret zakhmo me hai aachal se usey saaf karo
english translation text:
"I am a guest for only a little more time, stay close to me“
"The sands that fill my wounds, wipe them with your scarf"

urdu transliteration text:
Aati hai rone ki aawaz sakina dekho
Jaawo tum jaake sakina ko sambhalo ama
"Go, take care of Sakina, O Mother"
english translation text: "Behold! The sound of Sakina's crying arises!“

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Dekh wo aag lagi shame ghariba aayi
Dekho gabra ke nikal aayi meri ma jaayi
english translation text:
"Behold! the tents have been set ablaze! Sham-e-Ghariban is here“
"Behold! my mother's daughter (Zainab) has come out (of her tent) panicked"

urdu transliteration text:
Dekho behoosh sakina ka para hai bhayi
"Behold, Sakina's brother lies unconscious“
Jawo sajad ko sholo se nikalo ama
english translation text: "Go and pull Sajjad out of the flames, O Mother"

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"

urdu transliteration text:
Hai ghuzarish meri tumse abitni madar
Ama baba ki kasam dhamp lo moo par chadar
english translation text:
"I now have only a small request of you, O Mother“
"For the sake of father, cover your face"

urdu transliteration text: Dekha jayenga na ab tumse ye khooni manzar
english translation text: "For you will not be able to watch this bloody scene"

urdu transliteration text: Qatl hota hoon nighaho ko hataalo ama
english translation text: "I am being slain, turn away your eyes O Mother!"

urdu transliteration text: Garm reti pa me gir ta hu sambhalo ama
english translation text: "I'm falling on the burning sand, take hold of me, Mother"
